system.description: When you throw yourself in harm's way to protect another person or an important thing, roll +Tough.

failure.value: The person or object is not protected, and you mark In Jeopardy! or take a Condition, as appropriate.

partial.value: The person or object is protected, but you take the brunt of the damage. If you were not In Jeopardy!, mark In Jeopardy! If you are already In Jeopardy!, unmark it and take a Condition.

success.value: The person or object is protected, and you get away clean.

critical.value: The person or object is protected, and you get away clean. Additionally, you get an Edge.
